titleStmt.title: SII 20.60: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 60. (B.K. No. 76 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the Sōmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 13, Vibhava, Paushya, ba. 1, Sunday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1088, December 31. The eclipse occurred on the previous day.

The inscription, which is damaged, records the renewal of a gift of income from certain taxes, for the worship and offerings in a temple (name lost), by Mahāmātya Perggaḍe Chaṅgadēvayya and others when Daṇḍanāyaka Śrīdharayya and Daṇḍanāyaka Āsapayya were administering Vaḍḍarāvuḷa and other taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya ś®(śrī) prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ ś®(śrī)matribhuvanamalladēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā
namācandrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhi
gatapaṁcamahāśabdaṁ mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ
vāhanavastunāyakaṁ satyakānīnaṁ nītinidhānaṁ saraṇāgatavajrapaṁja
raṁ sākṣarikajanasamudharaṇa nāmādhi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma
ddaṇḍanāyakaṁ śrīridarayyaṁgaḷuṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ Āsapayyaṁgaḷuṁ mēlvaRead śrīdharayyaṁgaḷuṁ.
ṭṭi vaḍḍarāvuḷaveraḍuṁ bilkoḍeya suṁkanāḷuttamire svasti samastarājyabhara
nirūpita mahāmātyapadavīvirājamānamānōnnata prabhumaṁtrōtsā
hasaktitrayasaṁpannaṁ nuḍidu mattennaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ sujanaykamitraṁ śrīsōmē
svaradēvapādāraviṁda ṇakamaḷabhriṁgaṁ bhāvana siṁgaṁ śrīma
tperggaḍe caṁgadēvayya banavāsenāḍa davasāyada suṁkamaṁ
khēṇiyalu naḍevutta sujanapra
saṁgananugrārimanōbhaṁga samasta nalte bhāva
na siṁgaṁ . poṁguva ripukuḷamadamātaṁgamanaṟeyaṭṭi vuṭṭi
saṟrene sīḷalu bhaṁgiyalu nāgarudrana siṁgaṁgidirāṁpanāvanā
havadhuradoḷu . Antenisida perggaḍe caṁgadēvayyaṁgaḷge kalkeṟeya
ṭāṇāntarakke naḍava perggaḍe vāsudēvayyanuṁ mallayyanuṁ pū
rvvasāsanamaryyāde koṭṭirddudeṁduṁ binnapaṁgeyyalu śrī cāḷu
kyavikramakālada 13 neya vibhava pauśya bahuḷa 1 Ā
dityavārada sōmagraha ra dēvara gaṁdhadhū
pakkaṁ nivēdyakkaveṁdu ma vara kālaṁ karcci
punarddattiyāgi nālkuṁ suṁkadoḷaveraḍoldeṟe koḍavīsava sa
hitamāgi biṭṭa Uppina peṇṭi Aṟuvattu naṁdādīvigeya soḍa
reṇnege tiṁgaḷiṁge Oṁdu paṇamaṁ biṭṭariṁtī dharmmamaṁ khēṇisaṁjōgave
nnade kaykoṁḍu naḍusuvaravarade dharmma I dharmmamaṁ dayasiṁgaseṭṭi
yuvalliya taḷada baḷanjigaru naḍeyisuvariṁtī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge
vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷaṁ sāsirakavileyaṁ sāsirvvar brāhmaṇargge Ubhaya
mukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku I dharmamanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷaṁ sarvvabrā
hmaṇarggamā sāsira kavileyumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakanakku ©
Digital edition of SII 20.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
